title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented updates on NoSQL databases including Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable, emphasizing their suitability for AI workloads, agentic systems, and modern applications. The session covered architectural innovations, performance enhancements, and customer implementations across these high-performance, scalable services.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session surveys NoSQL database advancements across three managed services: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable, framed around AI and modern application workloads. It covers recent product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps aimed at agentic and AI application experiences. The relevance lies in how each service is positioned to support AI agents and modern apps rather than traditional NoSQL use alone.
